languages.text: "Понимаю. Вы, видимо, человек особой удачи, ведь лишь счастливчики могут позволить себе чистоплотность в Просторе Коронус".

traits.locale_text: "Понимаю. Вы, видимо, человек особой удачи, ведь лишь счастливчики могут позволить себе чистоплотность в Просторе Коронус".

languages.text: "I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."
languages.original_text: "Понимаю. Вы, видимо, человек особой удачи, ведь лишь счастливчики могут позволить себе чистоплотность в Просторе Коронус".

traits.locale_text: "I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford keeping their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."
"I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford keeping their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."
"I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."
"I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."
"I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."

languages.text: « Je comprends. Vous devez être {mf|né|née} sous une bonne étoile, parce qu'il faut avoir une chance inouïe pour garder ses mains propres dans les Étendues de Koronus. »
languages.original_text: "I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."

traits.locale_text: « Je comprends. Vous devez être {mf|né|née} sous une bonne étoile, parce qu'il faut avoir une chance inouïe pour garder ses mains propres dans les Étendues de Koronus. »

languages.text: "Ich verstehe. Sie müssen ein Mann von außerordentlichem Glück sein — schließlich können es sich nur die Glücklichen leisten, in der Koronus-Ausdehnung ihre Hände sauber zu halten."
languages.original_text: "I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe. Sie müssen ein Mann von außerordentlichem Glück sein — schließlich können es sich nur die Glücklichen leisten, in der Koronus-Ausdehnung ihre Hände sauber zu halten."

languages.text: "Entiendo. Debes de ser un hombre con una suerte extraordinaria. Después de todo, sólo los afortunados pueden permitirse mantener las manos limpias en la Expansión Koronus".
languages.original_text: "I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."

traits.locale_text: "Entiendo. Debes de ser un hombre con una suerte extraordinaria. Después de todo, sólo los afortunados pueden permitirse mantener las manos limpias en la Expansión Koronus".

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Olağanüstü şanslı bir adam olmalısınız — ne de olsa Koronus Expanse'de sadece şanslı olanlar ellerini temiz tutabilir."
languages.original_text: "I understand. You must be a {mf|man|woman} of extraordinary luck — after all, only the lucky ones can afford to keep their hands clean in the Koronus Expanse."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Olağanüstü şanslı bir adam olmalısınız — ne de olsa Koronus Expanse'de sadece şanslı olanlar ellerini temiz tutabilir."
